skills.name: Blockchain Fundamentals
skills.description: Understanding the core concepts of blockchain technology and how decentralized systems work.
skills.notes: Covers decentralization, distributed ledgers, blocks, transactions, and why blockchain is important. Also includes basic operations and real-world applications.

skills.name: Cryptography
skills.description: Mathematical techniques used to secure blockchain systems and transactions.
skills.notes: Includes hashing (SHA-256), public/private keys, digital signatures, and encryption methods used in blockchain.

skills.name: Consensus Mechanisms
skills.description: Protocols that ensure agreement across decentralized networks.
skills.notes: Includes Proof of Work (PoW), Proof of Stake (PoS), Delegated PoS, and other consensus algorithms.

skills.name: Blockchain Platforms
skills.description: Different blockchain ecosystems and their architectures.
skills.notes: Includes Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Binance Smart Chain, and Layer 2 solutions like Arbitrum.

skills.name: Smart Contracts
skills.description: Self-executing contracts with logic stored and executed on the blockchain.
skills.notes: Includes writing contracts in Solidity, understanding contract lifecycle, and deploying on blockchain networks.

skills.name: Web3 & dApp Development
skills.description: Building decentralized applications that interact with blockchain networks.
skills.notes: Includes frontend frameworks (React), libraries (web3.js, ethers.js), and connecting wallets like MetaMask.

skills.name: Oracles
skills.description: Systems that provide external data to blockchain smart contracts.
skills.notes: Includes Chainlink and oracle networks that connect real-world data with blockchain applications.

skills.name: Blockchain Security
skills.description: Practices to secure smart contracts and blockchain applications.
skills.notes: Includes vulnerability analysis, reentrancy attacks, fuzz testing, and tools like Slither and MythX.

skills.name: Storage & Scaling
skills.description: Techniques to store data efficiently and scale blockchain systems.
skills.notes: Includes decentralized storage (IPFS), Layer 2 solutions, rollups, sidechains, and Ethereum scaling strategies.

skills.name: Development, Testing & Deployment
skills.description: Tools and workflows for building, testing, and deploying blockchain applications.
skills.notes: Includes frameworks like Hardhat, Truffle, Foundry, unit testing, CI/CD, and monitoring deployed smart contracts.
